title: GenomeLens 双物种共线性基础分析
description: 双物种基础共线性分析子模块。它在两个物种之间完成序列比对、同源锚点筛选和共线性区块识别，得到后续点图、共线性图、核型图和局部共线性分析所需的核心中间结果。
description_en: A foundational pairwise synteny analysis submodule. It performs sequence alignment, homologous anchor filtering, and synteny block discovery between two species, producing the core intermediate results required for downstream dotplots, synteny figures, karyotypes, and local synteny analyses.
context: 适合作为双物种比较的起点，先建立同源与共线性基础，再衔接点图、核型图、局部共线性和候选位点分析。
context_en: Best used to establish the baseline homologous and syntenic relationships between two genomes before downstream visualization and candidate-locus analysis.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 输入两个待比较物种的文件目录。每个物种都应按同名前缀成对提供，支持 `BED + CDS/PEP` 或 `GFF/GTF + genome FASTA` 两类组合；插件会自动识别可用组合，并据此构建双物种同源搜索与共线性区块识别的原始输入。
params.description_en: Directory containing the two species to compare. Each species should be provided as a matched same-stem pair using either `BED + CDS/PEP` or `GFF/GTF + genome FASTA`. These files serve as the raw input for pairwise homology search and synteny block detection.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 该双物种分析的输出目录。通常会写出锚点、共线性区块以及可供后续图形模块继续使用的中间结果。
params.description_en: Output directory for this pairwise analysis. It typically contains anchors, synteny blocks, and reusable intermediate results for downstream visualization modules.

params.label: 线程数
params.description: 可用于该双物种流程的并行线程数，主要影响同源搜索阶段的运行速度。
params.description_en: Number of parallel threads available to the pairwise workflow, mainly affecting the runtime of the homology search stage.

params.label: 最小共线性区块大小
params.description: 保留一个双物种共线性区块所需的最小基因数。提高该值会让结果更保守，更偏向稳定的大区段。
params.description_en: Minimum number of genes required to retain a pairwise synteny block. Increasing this value makes the result more conservative and biased toward stable large segments.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 若该流程附带图件输出时使用的格式。矢量格式更适合后续编辑，位图格式更适合快速查看。
params.description_en: Figure format used when this workflow emits graphics. Vector formats are better for downstream editing, while raster formats are convenient for quick viewing.

params.label: 比对后端
params.description: 双物种同源搜索所使用的比对工具，不同后端会影响命中灵敏度、运行速度与最终锚点数量。
params.description_en: Alignment tool used for pairwise homology search. Different backends affect hit sensitivity, runtime, and the final number of anchors.

params.label: 序列类型
params.description: 同源搜索时使用的序列类型：核酸或蛋白。它会影响比对策略以及更适合的比对后端选择。
params.description_en: Sequence type used for homology search: nucleotide or protein. This influences the alignment strategy and the most suitable backend choice.

params.label: 额外产出双向同源目录
params.description: 开启后，在共线性结果之外额外产出双向 ortholog（同源基因对）目录；该目录由 catalog 后端生成，可供下游同源关系分析使用。
params.description_en: When enabled, additionally emits a bidirectional ortholog catalog alongside the synteny results. The catalog is produced by the catalog backend and can feed downstream homology analyses.

params.label: 同源匹配过滤强度
params.description: 控制同源匹配筛选的严格程度。更高的阈值通常能降低噪声，但可能同时减少远缘保守信号。
params.description_en: Controls the strictness of homology match filtering. Higher thresholds usually reduce noise but may also remove more distant conserved signals.

params.label: 共线性锚点最大基因距离
params.description: 定义锚点之间在基因顺序上允许的最大间隔，影响区块拼接的宽松程度。
params.description_en: Defines the maximum allowed spacing between anchors in gene order, affecting how permissively blocks are assembled.

params.label: Block 过滤迭代次数
params.description: 控制共线性区块清理的迭代次数。更多迭代通常让结果更干净，但也更保守。
params.description_en: Controls how many rounds of synteny block cleanup are performed. More iterations usually produce cleaner but more conservative results.
